calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to CCP section 583.310 and CCP section 583.360 and Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)
